articles.title: Ethereum's Merge won't stop its price from sinking
articles.description: Ethereum became deflationary after its September Merge. But for now, it's not going to make much of a difference.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Could Soon Be Listed on Crypto Exchange FTX, According to CEO Sam Bankman-Fried
articles.description: Crypto exchange FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried says he’s willing to bet that smart contract platform Cardano (ADA) will be listed on his platform soon. articles.title: Can the Aptos NFT Scene Compete With Ethereum’s?
articles.description: The hype around Aptos is driving intense activity to its various NFT marketplaces. There are signs, however, that the enthusiasm for Aptos NFTs may not stay consistent in the long run. Launched on October 17, Aptos is a Proof-of-Stake Layer 1 blockchain conceived by former Meta engineers. The protocol aims to leverage its new smart contract language, Move, in order to reach a throughput of...

articles.title: Cardano Price Prediction: FTX CEO Signals Upcoming ADA Listing
articles.description: The Cardano (ADA) price is trading inside an important horizontal support area, but has yet to show any bullish reversal signs whatsoever.

articles.title: Ripple’s Chief Engineer Calls It Quits — Will His Shocking Departure Upend XRP’s Recovery?
articles.description: Bougalis’ resignation comes as Ripple commences tests of an XRP Ledger sidechain compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), the software that runs smart contracts on Ethereum.

articles.title: Reddit Avatars Are A Hit, Surpass OpenSea In Number Of NFT Wallets
articles.description: Slowly but surely, Reddit Avatars fought their way into success. The initiative was initially mocked, but their second generation 40K collection sold out in 24 hours and the pieces’ prices are raising on the secondary market. Don’t call them NFTs, though. articles.title: Polygon's QuickSwap Hit With $220,000 Flash Loan Attack
articles.description: The popular DEX said Monday that it had closed its lending protocol QuickSwap Lend.

articles.title: Popular Trading Exchange Robinhood lists Aave And XTZ On Their Platfom
articles.description: Stock and crypto trading app Robinhood lists Aave and XTZ on their trading platform. Robinhood now supports 19 cryptocurrencies in total including memecoins such as DogeCoin and Shiba Inu. Robinhood’s shares jumped 14% on rumors that of acquisition from Sam Bankman Fried. Stock trading app Robinhood listed Aave and XTZ on their commission-free trading platform today. Aave is a DeFI lending...

articles.title: Warren Buffett-backed neobank picks Polygon for Web3 token — MATIC price eyes 100% rally
articles.description: MATIC has painted a bull flag setup with a profit target sitting nearly 100% higher than its current price.

articles.title: Binance Blows Crypto Exchange Competitors Away With 55% Dominance Over Spot Trading Volume
articles.description: Binance commands the greater share of crypto spot and derivatives trading in a 24 hour period, eclipsing competitors likes FTX, Coinbase, and KuCoin.

articles.title: FTX Sam Bankman-Fried hints at Cardano listing
articles.description: FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried has hinted that the exchange could soon be listing Cardano’s ADA for spot trading in an October 23 tweet.

articles.title: Ripple lead engineer steps down after decade at the company
articles.description: Ripple (XRP) Labs’ director of engineering Nik Bougalis has announced that he will leave the company after ten years in an October 22 Twitter thread.

articles.title: Solana Aims For Moonshots With Its Groundbreaking Smartphone — Disrupting Google and Apple
articles.description: Solana jumps into smartphone hardware with hopes to take a small portion of the market share from Apple, Samsung and Google in the coming years.

articles.title: Cosmos In A Downtrend Since Last 2 Months – Investors Shying Away From ATOM?
articles.description: Cosmos (ATOM) started this year with a bang by attaining its all-time high (ATH) on January 17 when it traded for $44.45. But just like other cryptocurrencies, it failed to sustain that level and was relentlessly pummeled by the volatile crypto market.
